title: Trident All Weather Channeling
description: Channeling works in any weather, not only thunderstorms
body:
![trident all weather channeling datapack/mod title image minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/trident_all_weather_channeling.png)
[![jodeks datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![trident all weather channeling minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/trident-all-weather-channeling/issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
## Channeling works without thunderstorms The trident needs to have the channeling enchantment You have to hit an entity, if the entity dies by hitting it, there wont be a lightning ### Supported mods **If you think a mod is missing, tell me on my discord server** https://modrinth.com/mod/tritastic
